description_long: This object is a rectangular jewelry display counter with a glass enclosure on the top and sides, allowing clear visibility of the items inside. The display area is divided into several sections, each bordered with red trim, and contains various jewelry trays arranged neatly. The base of the counter is solid, finished in a light gray color with a dark brown horizontal accent near the top and bottom. The glass panels are supported by a thin, dark frame, giving the counter a modern and secure appearance. The overall design is functional and elegant, suitable for showcasing valuable items in a retail jewelry store environment.
description: A rectangular glass jewelry display counter with red-trimmed sections and a solid gray and brown base, designed for showcasing jewelry in a retail setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass display area with multiple red-bordered jewelry trays visible inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the counter and the arrangement of trays extending toward the back.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same glass enclosure and tray arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the depth and the grid-like arrangement of trays inside the display.
